calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-28-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-31-2023 Continued To Aug-28-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-24-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Jun-27-2005 and first codicil dated Nov-12-2019 are admitted to probate. Eugene Chen Woo is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Nov-06-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.
